name: Chilled Beet and Cucumber Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 bunches spring onions (white and green parts)
3 cups or more chilled chicken stock
salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
dollop salted whipped cream or sour cream per serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or gently boil the beets for about 15 minutes.
2. When done, grate them on the coarse side of a grater.
3. Remove the seeds from the cucumbers.
4. Grate the cucumbers on the coarse side of the grater.
5. Chop the green onions.
6. Juice the oranges and grate the rind of 3 oranges.
7. Combine the beets, cucumbers, orange rind, and juice with 2 cups of chilled chicken stock in a large mixing bowl.
8. Puree the mixture in batches until smooth.
9. Chill for at least 3 hours before serving.
10. Adjust the consistency by adding more chilled chicken stock if needed.
11. Serve in chilled soup bowls.
12. Garnish with salted whipped cream or sour cream.
